feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Old admin accounts deactivation vs jobs and integrations
entry.content:
Hello, we would like to deactivate some old consultants accounts in our system but we see in the  Scheduled Job Manager and Integration Center that those  accounts  are associated  with  some  jobs ( as Job Owner  or Created by ) or integrations (as last modified). What  would  be the  impact  on the  jobs  and  integrations if we deactivate  those old  accounts? What  should we  have in mind  when doing so?

Thank you

entry.title: ZR35 Rule error
entry.content: When we run PT60,we are encountering an ZR35 error, Can someone help with this issue.

entry.title: API Odata V2 Events, empjob not pulling as of each event, but as of 1st employee record
entry.content:
Hi, using Odata V2 API to pull events is not pulling correctly. Its returning the oldest record for the employee, not their empjob data as of the event start date (effective date). I want to see all events for employees within a date range and have their EmpJob / user data show as of the event start date. I can do this in reporting in successfactors (story & table reports) so I know it CAN work . 

When I run the API Call i get the first sequence of user data for any event. one EE has 10 events since being hired (including a promotion, manager changes, etc.) and on each of them shows his user detail as of his hire event (sequence 1)

I tried it 2 ways EmpJob without any Nav fields 

/odata/v2/EmpJob?$format=JSON&$select=localJobTitle,endDate,event,seqNumber,eventReason,jobTitle,startDate,managerId&$filter=userId eq '74395'&fromDate=2023-01-01&toDate=2025-03-28

and EmpJob with Nav fields

odata/v2/EmpJob?$format=JSON&$expand=eventReasonNav,employmentNav&$select=eventReasonNav/event,eventReasonNav/externalCode,eventReasonNav/name,eventReasonNav/startDate,eventReasonNav/status,eventReasonNav/internalCode,businessUnit,managerId,localJobTitle,userId&$filter=userId eq '74395'&fromDate=2023-01-01&toDate=2025-03-28

entry.title: Possibilities and Limitations of GROW with SAP - Core HR Add-On
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am exploring the GROW with SAP – Core HR Add-On and would like to understand its full capabilities and constraints.

Since there is very little documentation or resources available on this subject, we are facing immediate challenges in implementation. Specially because client has purchased the GROW with SAP - Core HR Add-On license but has not opted for the SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC) license. We are trying to understand the full scope of what this add-on offers and its limitations compared to a full SuccessFactors EC implementation.

Could the SAP community help clarify:

Core Functionalities: What HR functionalities are available with the Core HR Add-On?

Limitations: What key features from SuccessFactors EC are not included in the Core HR Add-On?

Integration Possibilities: How does it integrate with other SAP modules (like Payroll, Time Tracking, or S/4HANA)?

Customization and Extensibility: Can we configure or extend this solution to meet specific client needs?

Implementation Considerations: Are there any best practices or challenges to keep in mind when deploying this add-on?

Since this is a new area with limited insights, any real-world experience, documentation, or reference materials would be highly valuable to us and the broader SAP community.

 

Warm Regards,

Aratrika Bardhan

entry.title: How to eliminate splits for a particular wage type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When there is IT0186 conversion in mid of the month, say exempt to PF, the basic pay and other allowances (AW) are split into 2 and the corresponding PF rates are applied on the 2nd half of the month (which is correct as per the standard).

But our requirement is, for particular annual bonus, company needs to pay PF for full amount if IT0186 status change is before 15th and no contribution if IT0186 status change is after 15th. How to achieve that in SAP PCR? 

Your help is much Appreciated. Thanks

entry.title: Error in Employee as a Business Partner and Synchronization with HCM Data
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to sync SAP user ID with BP. While creating communication, system is giving the below error

Whereas person no 5 do not exists in the system (While trying to delete the same via PA30-->Utilities -> Delete Personnel Number or via SE38--> RPUDELPN)

 

your help is much appreciated.

Thanks

Sumanta

entry.title: Fiori Leave Request App – Default Date Always Set to Tomorrow instead of Today
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently using SAP Fiori for managing absence requests in our S/4HANA On-Premise system, and it's working well overall. However, we face a small but frustrating issue with the default date behavior.

When employees are submitting absence requests (for example home office), the system automatically sets the next day’s date (i.e., tomorrow) as the default date. This is fine if someone is planning ahead, but it's really inconvenient when submitting the request at the end of the current day.

For instance, if I try to submit an absence for today (April 7th), the system always defaults to April 8th, requiring me to manually change the date to today.

We would like to change this default behavior so that the system always proposes today’s date instead of the next day.

I checked SPRO Configuration: 

Here, we have the following options for "Proposal of next absence date":

The D option currently results in tomorrow’s date being suggested, which is causing the issue.

Has anyone come across this issue? Is there a way to configure SAP Fiori or adjust via a BAdI to set today’s date as the default proposal instead of tomorrow’s date?


Thank you in advance

Best regards

entry.title: Notificacion de SDI no se genera en reporte S_AHR_61015994
entry.content:
Buen día Expertos,

Al momento de realizar una recontratación de un empleado a una nueva Unidad Organizativa (UO), o movimiento de una UO a otra, se genera el infotipo 0372 con la fecha de recontratación correctamente, pero cuando se ejecuta el reporte S_AHR_61015994 para dicho empleado; NO se genera notificación de SDI al IMSS.

Actualmente he revisado que los infotipos esten correctos, IT0006, IT0007 e IT0009, además he revisado la tabla V_T5F99K2 y todo se ve correcto.

Agradezco de antemano su apoyo para tratar de resolver este caso.

entry.title: Sensitive compensation data RBP subjected not hidden during the hiring approval wf
entry.content:
Hi,

we are encountering an issue when enhancing our EC configuration with some custom firlds in job info and in comp info portlet dedicated to very sensitive topics . We hardly worked to discriminate visibility and editability over those fields via RBP.

But the same fields are visible when hiring a new person in the workflow approval . The effect is that hiring approvers, set by role to do not have those fields in visibility, isntead can see fiends and content in the hiring approval workflow.

We openea ah hign priority tk to SAP, but it looks like this is the expected behaviour. Se also note https://me.sap.com/notes/3577609 .

We are looking for a workaround solution or for a suggestion to bypass it. Thanks

entry.title: IT 3415
entry.content:
Hello community,

In IT3415, under parental leave, I only have 2 absences visible in the fields. I need to add another absence there that can be selected. These absences already exists in 2001, 

 

Could you assist in how to do it, please?

entry.title: leave not due (Half Pay) configuration
entry.content:
i want to add absence type "leave not due (Half Pay)" in absence types such that it cannot be used unless quota is available, when i try to asssign this absence type to user , it shows an error message (i.e.,Earned Leave Quota Exists. 'Leave Not Due' are not allowed to avail). it can only used when qouta is not available, how i can configure this in my system step by step ?

I attached S.S of Leave not due with full pay , but i want to create with Half pay!

entry.title: Data fields description (not anonymized during test instance refresh)
entry.content:
Dear Community,

In order to be able to set up a test environments refresh policy for my company I need to obtain the description of data provided under fields that are not being not anonymized. I have raised this topic on SAP for Me portal under ticket no. 420302/2025, however was advised that "The circumstances you describe relate to a consulting problem, rather than a problem with the product. As a support team we only handle issues and defects in the system and have limited scope when it comes to consulting / how-to questions. What we suggest is to reach out to the Partner Delivery Community to get assistance as this type of request is not handled by the Product Support team." I will add that I was not able to find data fields description under https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/using-instance-refresh-tool/instance-refresh-data-anonymization-fields KBA as well. The fields I would like to understand in the first instance are:

- Employee Central - actor
- Employee Central - role_id
- Employee Central - COMPA_RATIO
- Employee Central emp_paycomp:AMOUNT 
- Employee Central emp_paycomp:PERCENT 
- Employee Central emp_paycomp:NUMBER 
- Employee Central PLACE_OF_BIRTH 
- Employee Central suffix 
- Employee Central account_number 
- Employee Central job_title 
- Employee Central extension 
- Employee Central IM_INFO 
- Employee Central amount 
- Employee Central EMP_JOB_INFO 
- Employee Central National_ID 
- Employee Central calculated_amount 

For example: what does "Actor" mean?

Thank you in advance for any help in this area.

Monika

entry.title: Evaluation Path for Calendar Team in MSS
entry.content:
Hi.

I have an issue with the application WDA Team Calendar

The Team Calendar is designed to display team members within the same organizational unit. and not display the manager that are subordinated, for example:

The manager of the position 40156186 can display the employee with position 40156186 and we need that also can see the employee manager of  the position 40156188, 40156191, 40156194

I am checking the documentation and this work with OADP:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/erphcm/3354684992.html

My question is:

What Path evaluation can use to get the resulted that I need?

Regards

entry.title: PT_COR_REQ Entry not updated in infotype 2011 and table TEVEN after Modifying fields in BADI
entry.content:
Hi Expert

I am in a situation where I need to modify the value of ORIGF or update the Value of TERID through BADI PT_COR_REQ while running T-code PTCOR. I have implemented the BADI and using method IF_EX_PT_COR_REQ~POST_VIA_BLOP.

Below is the code I have written to update the value of TERID the table is getting updated here but its not reflecting in Infotype 2011 or in Table TEVEN.

METHOD if_ex_pt_cor_req~post_via_blop.


    DATA: lt_event TYPE TABLE OF ptcor_tevdata_struc,
          ls_event LIKE LINE OF lt_event.

*    ex_tevent_tab = im_tevent_tab.
          lt_event = im_tevent_tab.

    LOOP AT lt_event INTO ls_event.
      ls_event-terid = 'BAC'.
*      MODIFY ex_tevent_tab FROM ls_event INDEX sy-tabix.
      MODIFY lt_event FROM ls_event INDEX sy-tabix.
    ENDLOOP.

    ex_tevent_tab[] = lt_event[].
  ENDMETHOD.

Post Method

Kindly Share your opinion that whether this BADI is suitable for this requirement or I'm doing anything wrong anything else here.  Aside this BADI any other option where I can update or modified the Fields Value that entry should be visible in Infotype 2011 and in Table TEVEN.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: HCM Switzerland employment contract printing functionality
entry.content:
Hello, Experts!

Those who are familiar or working with HCM settings or developments for Switzerland.

Do you print an employment contract (hiring contract) for an employee? If yes, what functionality do you use?

entry.title: wage type 1544 adj gpssa not adding in employee salary report zhrdata
entry.content:
Hi Team,

WT1544[adj gpssa] which is appearing in payslip and in RT. but not adding wt amount in /wp1 in zhrdata[Employee salary report]. payroll time is approaching. please suggest the solution.

payroll area - ae, payroll schema - ze00, 

 

i have maintained the processing classes with reference to 1500 adj basic .. but it is not adding in /wp1. i am new to hcm .. please guide.

Regards, 

Sadhana.

entry.title: Uploading Attachments via API
entry.content:
I am trying to upload a document, and attach it to a user's profile. The upload is successful and can be retrieved from the API using its ID, however I cannot find the file in the document manager, nor elsewhere in the UI. 

I have attached the sample body i am sending here:

im performing this action via the /odata/v2/Attachment endpoint

Thanks for any help

entry.title: SECURE 2.0 – IRS Proposed Regulations on Catch-Up-As-Roth Contributions Effective January 1, 2026
entry.content:
Hi All, could you please let me know below requirement would be addressed by HRSP Yearend update or it requires any configuration 

SECURE 2.0 – IRS Proposed Regulations on Catch-Up-As-Roth Contributions Effective January 1, 2026 

Beginning on January 1, 2026, employees who earned over $145,000 from the previous calendar year (in 2025), will have to make 401(k) Catch-up contributions into a Roth account, meaning all contributions need to be made on a post-tax basis.  The $145,000 in earnings should be based on FICA Wages.

 

The 401(k) mandatory post-tax catch-up contributions will only affect employees that meet these two main requirements:

  1. Have earned more than $145,000 in the previous calendar year (2025), and
  2. Be 50 years of age or older.

 

If an employee meets the two criteria above, then all catch-up contributions will need to be made as Roth contributions/after-tax basis. All other employees that do NOT meet these two requirements, will be exempt from the Roth contribution requirement.

entry.title: SAP SF EC TIME MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP SF EC Time Management, when an employee applies for leave, the request should go to their manager and get approved — how can this be achieved?

entry.title: One SF EC Instance mapped to two different S4 Hana system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Our customer want;s to replication mapping with one SF instance with two different S4 HANA systems
